zh-CN.name: 小番茄
zh-CN.intro: 小番茄是一种小小的、圆圆的水果，颜色红红的，吃起来甜甜的、水水的。它很有营养，小朋友可以放心吃。

story.title: 🐻小熊的小番茄
story.body: 小熊在农场里看到一排小番茄藤。藤上挂着许多红红的小番茄，像一个个小灯笼。小熊轻轻摘下一颗，放进嘴里咬了一下，“噗！”小番茄的汁水在嘴里爆开，又甜又酸，真好吃。小熊又摘了一些，用小篮子装好，带回家给妈妈。妈妈把小番茄洗干净，放在盘子里。小熊和妈妈你一颗我一颗，吃得可开心了。妈妈说：“小番茄是大自然的礼物，我们要谢谢它。”小熊点点头，觉得和妈妈一起吃小番茄是最幸福的事情。

knowledge.title: 小番茄长在哪里？
knowledge.body: 小番茄长在藤上，喜欢温暖的阳光。夏天和秋天是它成熟的时候，藤上会结出一串串红红的小番茄，特别可爱。

en.name: Cherry Tomato
en.intro: Cherry tomatoes are small, round, red fruits that taste sweet and juicy. They are nutritious and safe for children to eat.

story.title: 🐻The Little Bear's Cherry Tomatoes
story.body: The little bear walked by a row of cherry tomato vines at the farm. Many red baby tomatoes hung from the vines, like tiny lanterns. The little bear gently picked one and took a small bite. “Pop!” The juice burst in his mouth, sweet and sour—so delicious. He picked some more, put them in a small basket, and brought them home to his mom. Mom washed the cherry tomatoes and put them on a plate. They sat together, eating one after another, feeling so happy. Mom said, “Cherry tomatoes are a gift from nature, and we should be grateful.” The little bear nodded, thinking that sharing cherry tomatoes with Mom was the happiest thing.

knowledge.title: Where do cherry tomatoes grow?
knowledge.body: Cherry tomatoes grow on vines and love warm sunshine. They ripen in summer and fall, producing cute little red clusters on the vines.
